mapper.select:
SELECT id, username, email, role, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users
AND ( username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR role LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY
id username role created_at createdAt
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE 1=1) AS total_posts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE 1=1) AS total_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE 1=1) AS total_comments
